projectDescription: A modular .NET 8 NuGet library providing base repositories, base models, DTOs, EF Core configurations, encryption utilities, event bus integration, and ready-to-inherit controllers for ASP.NET Core applications.
keyFeatures: Generic base repositories (BaseRepository, MapRepository) with full CRUD, soft-delete, pagination, and partial update support
AutoMapper-integrated repository pattern (MapRepository) mapping between domain entities and DTOs
Base EF Core DbContext classes (FoundationKitDbContext, FoundationKitIdentityDbContext) with automatic CreatedAt/UpdatedAt tracking
Abstract base models (BaseModel, BaseBasicModel) with Id, timestamps, soft-delete, and audit fields
Built-in pagination via Paginate query model and PaginationResult<T> response
Abstract base controllers for ASP.NET Core MVC and API (ApiCoreController, ApiMapController, MvcCoreController)
Minimal API handler pattern via IEndpointRouteHandler and UseFoundationKitApiHandlers
Dual-mode encryption: RSA/NaCl-based asymmetric (TweetNaCl/CurveX25519) and AES symmetric encryption
RabbitMQ event bus integration with typed message handlers, publisher, and background consumer service
LINQ/IQueryable pagination extension (PaginateAsync) and enum display-name helper
publicApiSurface: IBaseRepository<TModel>: GetPaginatedListAsync, GetListAsync, GetAll, CreateAsync, UpdateAsync, UpdatePartialEntityAsync, GetByIdAsync, SoftRemoveAsync, RemoveAsync, ExistAsync, GetOneAsync, CountAsync, CommitAndResultAsync
IMapRepository<TInputModel, TEditModel, TDtoModel>: GetPaginatedList, GetList, GetAll, Create, Update, GetById, SoftRemove, Remove, Exist, GetOneAsync, Count, CommitAndResultAsync
BaseRepository<TContext, TModel>: abstract EF Core base repository implementing IBaseRepository
MapRepository<TContext, TEntity, TInputModel, TEditModel, TDtoModel>: AutoMapper-backed repository implementing IMapRepository
BaseModel: Id (Guid), CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, IsDeleted, CreatedBy, UpdatedBy
BaseBasicModel: BaseModel without auditing columns mapped to DB
BaseInput / BaseEdit / BaseOutput: DTO base classes for create, update, read operations
Paginate: Page, Qyt, OrderByDesc, NoPaginate, Query
PaginationResult<T>: ActualPage, Qyt, PageTotal, Total, Results
FoundationKitDbContext / FoundationKitIdentityDbContext: abstract DbContext bases
EFCoreConfiguration<TEntity>: abstract entity configuration with global soft-delete query filter
FoundationKitStaticOptions.DateUtc: global UTC date toggle
ApiCoreController<TModel, TService>: abstract API controller (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE + pagination)
ApiMapController<TService, TDtoModel, TInputModel, TEditModel>: AutoMapper-backed abstract API controller
MvcCoreController<TModel, TService>: abstract MVC controller (Index, Create, Update, Delete)
FoundationKitExtensions.AddFoundationKit: registers AutoMapper
FoundationKitExtensions.AddFoundationKitIdentity / AddFoundationKitIdentityWithMapper: Identity DI setup
FoundationKitExtensions.AddFoundationKitEncryptor: registers IEncryptorService
IEncryptorService: EncryptCore, DecryptCore, AESEncrypt, AESDecrypt
FoundationKitAesEncryptorMiddleware: request-body AES decryption middleware
IEndpointRouteHandler.MapEndpoints: minimal-API handler interface
UseFoundationKitApiHandlers(assembly): scans and registers all IEndpointRouteHandler implementations
EventExtensions.AddEvents(RabbitConfig): registers RabbitMQ connection, publisher, and consumer background service
EventExtensions.AddSubscriber<T>: registers a queue binding for a message type
IRabbitMessageBroker.PublishAsync<TMessage>: publishes a message or batch to an exchange
IMessageHandler<TMessage>.HandleAsync: implement to consume messages from RabbitMQ
QueryableExtensions.PaginateAsync / Paginate: IQueryable pagination helpers
EnumExtension.GetDisplayName: reads [Display] attribute from enum values
